description: Selected business direction from L1 discovery phase

direction.name: Micro-SaaS Product
direction.market: Solo developers and small dev teams needing automated changelog generation from git commits and PRs
direction.positioning: AI-powered changelog generator that turns messy commit histories into polished, user-facing release notes — deployed in 5 minutes
direction.revenueModel: Freemium SaaS — free for public repos, $12/mo per private repo, $49/mo team plan (unlimited repos)
direction.differentiator: Integrates directly into CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI) with zero config. Understands commit conventions and PR descriptions to generate human-readable summaries.
direction.targetCustomer: Developer tool makers and SaaS companies shipping weekly who want professional changelogs without manual effort
risks: GitHub may build this natively into their release notes feature
Low switching cost — users can easily try alternatives
Must prove value beyond what GPT-4 in a script can do

alternatives.name: API Documentation Generator
alternatives.reason_rejected: Crowded space — Mintlify, ReadMe, and Swagger dominate

alternatives.name: Code Review Bot
alternatives.reason_rejected: Enterprise sales cycle too long for solo founder
